issues.description: Rest is incorrect for 'cannot attack' effect. Should use GiveKeyword with keyword 'CannotAttack' or similar restriction mechanic. Rest only exhausts a card.
Target specifies single selection but text says 'Up to 2'. maxCost:4 is correct but count should be up to 2 characters, not 1.
Duration missing. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar turn-locked duration, not permanent.
